title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at MobiKwik

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at MobiKwik
jsonLd.description:
We at MobiKwik are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Vijayawada. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About MobiKwik:
MobiKwik is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MobiKwik!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
